mapper.select: SELECT no, name, poster, address FROM food ORDER BY no ASC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT 12 ROWS ONLY
SELECT no, name, poster, address FROM food WHERE ${column} LIKE '%'||#{fd}||'%' ORDER BY no ASC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT 12 ROWS ONLY
SELECT CEIL(COUNT(*)/12.0) FROM food WHERE ${column} LIKE '%'||#{fd}||'%'
